div1.entryFree:
Advertisement, (advértisement) 1) intelligence, information: this a. is five days old, H4A III, 2, 172.
2) instruction, advice: my griefs are louder than a. Ado V, 1, 32. that is an a. to a proper maid in Florence, to take heed, Alls IV, 3, 240. yet doth he give us bold a. H4A IV, 1, 36.
